top_signals.title: 'We Assume Immigration Policy Returns to Baseline in 2029' Says Martha Gimbel
top_signals.summary: Martha Gimbel, Executive Director at Yale Budget Lab, discusses immigration, debt, AI and the labor market. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
